channel.title: Fairly Odd Streamers Blog
channel.description: Tips, guides, and insights for livestreamers.

item.title: Private Twitch Stream: How & Why To Set Up a Private Stream
item.description: A private Twitch stream is an exclusive stream where you restrict access to a certain audience, such as your friends. Learn how to setup a private stream.
item.author: brian-meller

item.title: Twitch Chat Logs Explained: How to Review in 2024
item.description: In this post we explain chat logs and why you should check them.
item.author: kody-wirth

item.title: Twitch Stream Delay: Everything to Know in 2024
item.description: Twitch stream delay is the short period of time between when something happens on your computer, and when your viewers see it. We explain the pros and cons of its usage.
item.author: kody-wirth

item.title: Twitch Teams Explained
item.description: Twitch Teams is a Twitch Partner Program feature that unites and connects streamers together as a community. In this post we explain the benefits of joining a team.
item.author: kody-wirth

item.title: How to Change Your Twitch Name
item.description: As your Twitch channel grows, you may find that the original name that you chose doesn’t quite fit anymore. See how you can change your Twitch name here 👉
item.author: kody-wirth

item.title: Streaming Isn't a Dream Job
item.description: Being a full-time streamer isn't as glamorous as you think. Let's see what it's really like to be a top 1% streamer and how easy (or hard) it is.
item.author: brian-meller

item.title: What is Malding? A Guide to Losing Your Mind Over Video Games
item.description: So bad, so mad, so bald, so mald.
item.author: brian-meller

item.title: How to Host on Twitch
item.description: Did you know that you can grow your Twitch channel and connect with other streamers while you’re not even streaming? See how to host on Twitch.
item.author: kody-wirth
